pipeline.label: Raw 2048-bin
pipeline.description: Per-pixel intensity counts straight off the Raman microscope CCD. 2048 bins spanning ~76-3499 cm-1.

pipeline.label: Cosmic-ray removal
pipeline.description: Single-bin spikes from cosmic rays hitting the CCD get nuked via a MAD-robust median filter at z=5 sigma.

pipeline.label: arPLS baseline subtracted
pipeline.description: Fluorescence creates a slow-varying baseline that buries the Raman peaks. arPLS fits and subtracts a sparse Whittaker baseline.

pipeline.label: Savitzky-Golay smoothed
pipeline.description: A low-order polynomial smoother preserves Raman peak shape while killing high-frequency CCD noise.

pipeline.label: Cropped to fingerprint + C-H stretch
pipeline.description: Drops the silent 1800-2800 cm-1 region and noisy edges; keeps 400-1800 (fingerprint) + 2800-3050 (C-H stretch).

pipeline.label: SNV normalized
pipeline.description: Standard Normal Variate: per-spectrum z-score. Corrects multiplicative scatter from focus + cell density variation.
